MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
R. Boyd McSparran, Esq. of GOLDSTEIN, GELLMAN 673-5600, for defendants AARON NALDOZA, ANN MARIE URBANSKI NALDOZA and JOHN CURTIN, moving for summary Adjudication
Drexel A. Bradshaw, Esq. and Mary J. Bosworth, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF DREXEL A. BRADSHAW 433-4800, for plaintiffs, opposing the motion

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANTS AARON NALDOZA, ANN MARIE URBANSKI NALDOZA and JOHN CURTIN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION -- Granted as to 2nd, 3rd, 4th causes of action. Denied as to 1st, 5th, 6th, 7th and 8th causes of action. False promise of long term tenancy to induce plaintiff into signing the lease is stricken from plaintiff's complaint. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/JL-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2003 Set For Trial On Nov-10-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-23-03 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 502

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mary J. Bosworth, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF DREXEL A. BRADSHAW 433-4800, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANTs AARON NALDOZA, Ann Marie Urbanski Naldoza and John Curtin's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Overruled, 10 days leave to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
